_comment: Mission for swarm_arena.world (16x16 walled empty room, 4 robots). Spawns: robot1=(2,2) robot2=(-2,2) robot3=(-2,-2) robot4=(2,-2) — one per quadrant. No internal obstacles; walls at +/-8. Each robot runs a 2-loop patrol (8 waypoints) of a 4x4 square in its own quadrant, every waypoint >=2m from the walls to avoid costmap-inflation slowdowns. Open lanes give Nav2 near-deterministic straight-line paths (low mission-time variance). Mission total = 32 waypoints. Mitigation case: victim robot3 soft-freezes mid-mission; the orchestrator reassigns its entire remaining queue to the nearest healthy robot (robot4, the bottom-right neighbour). Format: [x, y] in the map frame (yaw defaults to 0).
